name: opsforge demo
//: Opens the interactive opsforge sandbox in a Codespace / dev container. Builds the same image as `docker run -it opsforge-demo` (demo/Dockerfile.demo): a forged zsh shell in a fake prod context, with no-op tool stubs. Nothing here reaches real infrastructure.
//postAttach: The image ENTRYPOINT is the guided tour; in a Codespace open a terminal and run ./demo-tour.sh, or just start typing — the shell is already forged.
